caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones is positioned in front of a professional microphone. He is seen in profile, facing left toward the microphone. In the background, a room is decorated with framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and olive pants. Clothing racks and a black ornate chair are also visible. Two logos appear on screen: a circular logo on the left containing the text "THE" and a red stylized logo on the right containing the text "REALLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar pose, though his head tilts slightly downward and he moves closer to the microphone, while the camera angle shifts subtly.
